notes: Big-Five-only derivative of the TakeLab PANDORA Reddit dataset. ~3M rows across train/validation/test parquet shards under data/. Attribute fields: O, C, E, A, N (Big Five scores, 0-100) and ptype (personality type, 0-31); plus a raw 'text' field. The full PANDORA (adding MBTI, Enneagram, and demographics: age/gender/location) is request-gated at https://psy.takelab.fer.hr/datasets/all/pandora/. License apache-2.0 is set by the HF uploader; underlying PANDORA terms may differ, so confirm provenance before redistributing raw data (DATASHEET TODO).
